subject: Re: Memory of tomogram CTF
body:
Not sure what to suggest without more info - image size/detector etc. If I was in your position I would try to process one tilt series from a dataset which is known to work (EMPIAR-10164, for example) and see whether I run into the same issues. If not, then try to work out what’s different about my data.

Good luck,

Alister

> On 23 Mar 2021, at 16:15, yuqi zhang <824586412@qq.com> wrote:
> 
> Hi. I tried the UK English and US English. Neither works.
> 
> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午11:33:14<yuqi zhang> 写道：
> OK, I will try it tomorrow and then reply you.
> 
> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午11:31:46<alist...@gmail.com <applewebdata://CB7F5DE5-4BF2-42E4-9B81-5E293B7BC614>> 写道：
> I’m not sure if this will definitely solve your problem, just trying to help you troubleshoot, please test and report back so others can avoid similar issues
> 
> 
>> On 22 Mar 2021, at 15:29, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com <>> wrote:
>> 
> 
>> So should I change the labguage to UK or US? Are they the same? 
>> 
>> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午11:22:06<alist...@gmail.com <http://gmail.com/>> 写道：
>> Language settings of the OS - some discussion in the links below
>> 
>> https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/wHgFAG1ftuI/m/QLOlP76iAQAJ <https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/wHgFAG1ftuI/m/QLOlP76iAQAJ>
>> https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/v1Y65G3DKHo/m/pSq206L9AwAJ <https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/v1Y65G3DKHo/m/pSq206L9AwAJ>
>> 
>> Cheers,
>> 
>> Alister
>> 
>> 
>>> On 22 Mar 2021, at 15:19, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com <>> wrote:
>>> 
>> 
>>> You meant the language of OS? or Warp? I haven't ever found the language settings of Warp&M.
>>> 
>>> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午9:14:23<alist...@gmail.com <http://gmail.com/>> 写道：
>>> Hi Yuqi,
>>> 
>>> If you’re talking about even/odd images for training the noise2noise network, these should have no bearing on tilt-series CTF estimation but the fact that there are problems there shows there might be problems elsewhere - possibly due to language settings as I mentioned
>>> 
>>> Cheers and good luck!
>>> 
>>> Alister
>>> 
>>> 
>>>> On 22 Mar 2021, at 11:08, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com <>> wrote:
>>>> 
>>> 
>>>> I have done the CTF estimation of each tilt-series before reconstruct. I will run it again and send the error message. 
>>>> 
>>>> I have another question. When I did the tilt-series preprocessing(for example, 1000 .mrc files), I found that there were only 130 denoising output files while the number of other output files were correct. I wondered whether it would affect the results or the preprocessing quality. How can I deal with it? Now, I run 41*3 tilt-series micrographs at a time. It seemed like not convenient.
>>>> 
>>>> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午6:49:32<alist...@gmail.com <http://gmail.com/>> 写道：
>>>> Hi Yuqi,
>>>> 
>>>> Something about your workflow seems a bit wrong - you should estimate the CTF of each tilt-series then reconstruct the tomograms.
>>>> Can you share the error and some information about your images (detector? Super-resolution?)? 
>>>> 
>>>> Your hardware should be fine for what you’re trying to do - some people have mentioned previously that changing language settings to US English (particularly the decimal separator) has solved problems for them.
>>>> 
>>>> Cheers,
>>>> 
>>>> Alister
>>>> 
>>>>> On 22 Mar 2021, at 10:41, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com <>> wrote:
>>>>> 
>>>> 
>>>>> After reconstructing the tomogram with Warp, I did CTF as tutorial. However, there was an error that memory was not enough. My hardware was 1080Ti 12G, RAM 128G. I didn't know the hardware requirements that could do all of tomogram data processing in Warp and M.
